headline: Xcel Energy Could Hit $89 by Year-End as UBS Argues Wildfire Risks Are Already Priced Into $76.75 Stock
summary: Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) has delivered a 14% gain over the past year, and analysts cluster around a consensus target of $88.44. UBS cut its price target to $89 from $93 while keeping its Buy rating, arguing the recent selloff has pushed the stock below UBS’s assessed fair value. That target implies meaningful upside from current ... Xcel Energy Could Hit $89 by Year-End as UBS Argues Wildfire Risks Are Already Priced Into $76.75 Stock

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Spotlight On 3 Utilities Stocks With Over 3% Dividend Yields
summary: Investors seek high-dividend stocks in market turbulence. Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page offers latest analyst takes on top utility stocks.
